title: Raccoon Removal in Westbury, NY | $900 - $4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Westbury, Long Island. Humane trapping, exclusion, and cleanup. Licensed experts serving Westbury homes and businesses. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Dealing with raccoons in your Westbury property requires immediate professional attention to prevent structural damage and health hazards. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive raccoon removal services throughout Westbury, from the Garden City area to Old Westbury estates. Our licensed technicians use humane trapping methods and permanent exclusion solutions to protect your Long Island home or business.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Westbury and Long Island communities for years with specialized raccoon removal expertise. Our team understands the unique challenges of Nassau County properties and delivers fast, effective, and humane wildlife solutions with guaranteed results.
localContext: Westbury's mix of historic residential neighborhoods, commercial districts near Old Country Road, and proximity to wooded areas creates ideal conditions for raccoon intrusions. Properties near Eisenhower Park and the NYIT campus are particularly susceptible to wildlife activity, making professional exclusion services essential for Long Island homeowners.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Westbury?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Westbury typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry points requiring exclusion, and any necessary attic cleanup or repair work. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates for all Westbury properties.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Westbury home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service to Westbury residents. Initial trapping typically begins within 24 hours of your call, with most raccoons removed within 3-7 days depending on the situation. Emergency services are available for urgent cases involving aggressive animals or significant property damage.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Westbury neighborhoods?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are very common throughout Westbury due to the area's mature trees, accessible food sources, and proximity to green spaces like Eisenhower Park. They frequently seek shelter in attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces, especially during breeding season in spring and when seeking winter denning sites.

faqs.question: Do you offer humane raccoon removal in Westbury?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use only humane, live-catch trapping methods that comply with New York State wildlife regulations. After safe removal, we relocate raccoons according to Nassau County guidelines and provide complete exclusion services to seal entry points and prevent future intrusions in your Westbury property.
